description: zero_flag, carry_flag, negative_flag, and overflow_flag return correct values for every case, including the tricky overflow examples
carry_flag reads bit 4 of add4; overflow_flag uses the same-sign-in / flipped-sign-out rule — they are computed differently because they mean different things
Flags are built from get_bit, the gate functions, and add4 — no shortcuts with comparisons or if-statements
